name: Sydon
description: Inflict maximum devastation with this massive Grineer trident.

components.name: Amphis
components.description: Fashioned with Grineer materials and balanced for marine infantry use, the Amphis is a traditional staff weapon that has received a monstrous makeover that enables shock damage on jump attacks. Connects with multiple enemies with each strike.

components.name: Alloy Plate
components.description:
Carbon steel plates used to reinforce Grineer armor.

Location: Venus, Phobos, Ceres, Jupiter, Pluto, and Sedna.

components.name: Blueprint
components.description: Fashioned with Grineer materials and balanced for marine infantry use, the Amphis is a traditional staff weapon that has received a monstrous makeover that enables shock damage on jump attacks. Connects with multiple enemies with each strike.

components.name: Circuits
components.description:
Various electronic components.

Location: Venus, Ceres, and the Kuva Fortress

components.name: Neurodes
components.description:
Biotech sensor organ harvested from Infested entities.

Location: Earth, Lua, Eris, and Deimos

components.name: Salvage
components.description:
High value metals collected from war salvage.

Location: Mars, Jupiter, and Sedna

patchlogs.name: Update 31.5: Angels of the Zariman
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Korumm using Vaykor Sydon VFX and HUD icons when blocking.

patchlogs.name: The New War: Hotfix 31.0.7
patchlogs.fixes:
Fixed Vaykor Sydon's Radial Blind special attack not functioning.
Fixed ability to put Sydon Rivens on the Korumm.

patchlogs.name: Update 26: The Old Blood
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed the Lahnss Polearm Skin not equipping correctly on the Sydon/Vaykor Sydon.

patchlogs.name: The Jovian Concord: Update 25.1.0
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed the Liset Sydonia Skin having incorrect vent FX.

patchlogs.name: Buried Debts: Update 24.4.0
patchlogs.changes: Vaykor Sydon’s Radial Blind now triggers upon toggling Melee Channel on/off if you have the required charges stored.

patchlogs.name: Plains of Eidolon: Update 22.8.0 + Hotfix 22.8.0.1
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed an issue with the Varykor Sydon's Radial Blind looping its animation.

patchlogs.name: The Silver Grove: U2.1 + U2.2
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed the Vaykor Sydons charge FX not resetting when dropping the block before being fully charged.

patchlogs.name: Update 18.2.0
patchlogs.fixes:
The Sydon has arrived!  A deadly weapon designed for piercing the hearts of enemies, inflict maximum devastation with this massive Grineer trident.
Add the Sydon to your Arsenal today by visiting the Warframe Market or Clan Research!
